prompt: A unique, professionally designed brand logomark on a pure solid WHITE background, centered with margin. ONE single elegant continuous monoline of even weight that traces a capital letter 'A' whose two legs sweep downward and loop back to form a horizontal INFINITY symbol (∞) at the base — fusing the letter A with eternity. San Marino blue (#4D6E9E) line, smooth confident curves, premium clinical biotech identity, distinctive and memorable, generous negative space. Flat, no gradient. ICON ONLY — NO wordmark, NO text, no letters other than the implied A.

Premium, clean, balanced, instantly recognizable as a single symbol. ICON ONLY, NO wordmark, NO text.
